context: Evaluates the agent's ability to create a .context/analysis file from audit or review results with summary, findings, and conclusion sections.

checklist.name: Correct type
checklist.description: File created under .context/analysis/ with type: ANALYSIS in frontmatter

checklist.name: Valid frontmatter
checklist.description: Frontmatter has title, type, status, date; status is done for completed analysis

checklist.name: Findings section
checklist.description: Findings section with bullet points or structured observations
